# Aglet Help

## Documentation

    Concepts Reference
        Items, categories, views, section types, automatic assignment,
        and the data model. Start here to understand how aglet works.

    TUI Guide
        Complete guide to the terminal interface: keybindings for every
        mode, interactive workflows, the view/category editors, and
        indicators.

    CLI Reference
        Every aglet command and flag: item, category, view, link, import,
        export, filtering, sorting, and workflow commands.

## About

    Aglet is a free-form personal information manager modeled after
    Lotus Agenda, re-imagined as a modern TUI. Items, categories,
    and views are the three core concepts; the rest follows from them.

    Source: github.com/msnodderly/aglet
